rulings.Case Title: RONALD GRIST VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS'B*P' AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, February 23, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant ABHI-Crockett, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is denied. A defendant remains liable for its own tortious conduct even after selling the facility where the conduct occurred to another party. Defendant's remedy, if any, is to seek indemnity from Sugar Acquisition Corporation. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: RONALD PALMER VS. AC AND S INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Pneumo Abex Llc Successor In Interest To Abex Corporation Erroneously Sued Herein As Pneumo-Abexs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, February 23, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. DEFENDANT PNEUMO ABEX LLC SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO ABEX Defendant Pneumo Abex Llc Successor In Interest To Abex Corporation Erroneously Sued Herein As Pneumo-Abexs' Motion For Reconsideration is off calendar. The case has been removed to federal court. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: JEROME SHERFY VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, February 23, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. DEFENDANT TOSCO REFINING COMPANY, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is taken off calendar per request of moving party. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: EDWARD RISSE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, February 23, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Calaveras Asbestos, Ltd.'s motion for summary judgment is denied. The declarations of the plaintiff and Mr. Kahlen create a triable issue whether plaintiff worked with Johns-Manville transite pipe containing fibers supplied by the defendant. The objections to those declarations are overruled. =(220/HEK)
